error_signature: This message was sent automatically with n8n
title: Persistent n8n attribution signature in Telegram messages
symptom: The message 'This message was sent automatically with n8n' appears in all Telegram messages sent from workflows, despite attempts to remove it.
not_this_if: The attribution signature is not present in other messaging nodes
root_cause: The attribution signature is enabled by default in the Telegram node settings. Even if the environment variable to disable it is set, the node's internal configuration may still require manual adjustment.
fix_steps: Open the Telegram node settings in your workflow
Locate the option for 'n8n attribution' and disable it
Save the workflow and test sending a message again
agent_instruction: Disable the 'n8n attribution' option in the Telegram node settings.
